dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.enableForStats: Enable history in settings to see your stats

history.title: History
history.clearBody: Are you sure you want to delete all transcripts?
history.enableToSave: Enable history in settings to save transcripts

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.subtitle: Add words and short phrases you use often. Fing will prefer these when transcribing.
dictionary.usage: {used}/{maximum} terms used · Up to {words} words each
dictionary.enterTerm: Enter a word or short phrase
dictionary.tooManyWords: Terms can be up to {count} words
dictionary.duplicate: That term is already in your dictionary

languageSelect.atLeastOne: At least one language is required

settings.title: Settings
settings.appLanguageDescription: Choose the language used by Fing
settings.transcriptionLanguagesDescription: Select one for best accuracy, or multiple for auto-detection
settings.testMicrophoneDescription: Check if your microphone is working
settings.inferenceDeviceDescription: Automatically uses the fastest suitable processor. Manual changes apply after restart.
settings.inferenceRestartRequired: Restart Fing to apply this processor selection.
settings.inferenceSelectedPredicted: Selected {device} through {backend}; it will be verified when the model loads.
settings.inferenceLastSelected: Last transcription selected {device} through {backend}; runtime verification was unavailable.
settings.inferenceFallbackNoVulkan: No usable Vulkan GPU was detected, so Fing will use the CPU.
settings.inferenceFallbackMemory: The detected GPUs do not have enough available memory for this model, so Fing will use the CPU.
settings.inferenceFallbackMissing: The selected GPU is no longer available. Fing selected the best available fallback.
settings.inferenceFallbackInitialization: A GPU could not initialize. Fing selected the next working option.
settings.inferenceFallbackExecution: The last GPU attempt fell back to CPU during execution.
settings.inferenceFallbackGeneric: Fing selected a safe fallback processor.
settings.accessibilityDescription: Required for global hotkey and paste
settings.applicationUpdatesDescription: Check for and install the latest version
settings.startOnLoginDescription: Launch Fing when you log in
settings.turnOffHistoryBody: All saved transcripts will be permanently deleted.

models.lazyLoadingDescription: Save memory and load the model on hotkey press; unload it after 10 seconds idle
models.deleteBody: You can download it again later.

dialogs.hotkeyFailed: Failed to set hotkey. Try another key.
dialogs.deviceFallback: Selected device not found. Using fallback device.
dialogs.restartBody: Fing needs to restart to load the new model.
dialogs.inferenceRestartBody: Fing needs to restart to apply the new Whisper processor.

updates.versionAvailableWithNotes:
Version {version} is available.

Release notes:
{notes}

Install now?
updates.installed: The update was installed. Fing will now restart.

startup.permissionsBody:
Fing needs permission for {permissions} to record and paste text.

Open Fing from the tray, go to Settings > Permissions, and click Allow.
startup.newHotkeyBody:
Your saved recording hotkey uses an older format and needs to be set again.

Open Fing from the tray, go to Settings, and choose a new hotkey.

onboarding.featureMic: Mic only active while you hold the hotkey
onboarding.downloadingSubtitle: This usually takes under a minute on a fast connection.
onboarding.analyzingSystemDescription: Fing is choosing the fastest suitable way to run Whisper.
onboarding.analysisUnavailableDescription: Setup can continue. Fing will choose a safe processor when the model loads.
onboarding.processorsRecognized: Recognized: {devices}. You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.downloadFailedSubtitle: Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.restoreSubtitle: The selected model is missing and needs to be downloaded again.
onboarding.repairSubtitle: The selected model could not be verified and needs to be replaced.
onboarding.saveModelFailed: Could not save the selected model. Please try again.
onboarding.repairFailed: Model repair did not finish. Download the model again and retry.
onboarding.accessibilityRequired: Required for the global hotkey and pasting
onboarding.grantRemaining: Grant the remaining permission in System Settings, then return here.
onboarding.microphoneHint: You can switch microphones any time from the settings.
onboarding.trySubtitle: Hold {hotkey} and say something. Release to transcribe.
onboarding.firstTranscription: First transcription may take a few seconds.
onboarding.completeSubtitle: Press your hotkey anywhere to dictate.
onboarding.holdToRecord: Hold {hotkey} in any app to start recording
onboarding.releaseToPaste: Release the key to transcribe and paste
onboarding.tweakLater: Tweak anything later from the settings menu
onboarding.saveMicrophoneFailed: Could not save your microphone selection. Try again.
onboarding.setupFailed: Setup did not finish. Please confirm the model download and try again.
